name: absf
hover: Returns the absolute value of a float.

name: absi
hover: Returns the absolute value of an int.

name: clampi
signature: clampi(value: int, min: int, max: int) -> int
hover: Clamps an int value between min and max.

name: cos
hover: Returns the cosine of an angle in radians.

name: tan
hover: Returns the tangent of an angle in radians.

name: ceilf
hover: Rounds a float upward to the nearest whole value.

name: floorf
hover: Rounds a float downward to the nearest whole value.

name: roundf
hover: Rounds a float to the nearest whole value.

name: lerp
signature: lerp(from: Variant, to: Variant, weight: Variant) -> Variant

name: remap
signature: remap(value: float, istart: float, istop: float, ostart: float, ostop: float) -> float
hover: Maps a value from one range to another.

name: is_equal_approx
hover: Returns true if two floats are approximately equal.

name: is_zero_approx
hover: Returns true if a float is effectively zero.

name: randf_range
hover: Returns a random float in the provided range.

name: randfn
hover: Returns a normally distributed random float.

name: var_to_str
hover: Converts a Variant to a serialized string representation.

name: str_to_var
hover: Converts a serialized string back to a Variant.

name: preload
hover: Loads a resource at parse time.
